At the same time, a mango tree does not take up much space.  Yes, it is a different thing that it will take a lot of time to make a mango tree,  but I told you the analogy in my mind.

Yield statement returns a value from the generator and suspends the execution of the function until the next value is requested.  Do you understand what this means?  Now I will tell you what this means.
